title.rendered: Do Great Companies Get It Right The First Time?

content.rendered: We all know amazing companies with powerful strategy, amazing market insights, and strong leaders who are focused on success.  Do these companies get it right from the start, or do they learn and evolve differently from the rest of us? David Reske of Nowspeed talks with Carmen Williams, who is an expert on evolutionary marketing at Zuper and believes that great companies make mistakes, but they learn faster and adapt quickly to what they learn. No company does everything right from the start, but with the right level of focus, testing and emotional intelligence you can pivot to greatness. This conversation will help you think about how to learn, test and adapt to hit your goals. Listen to it now!
